name: Maple-Buttermilk Bread~ (Abm)
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Plus 1 teaspoon pure maple syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the order listed into the bread machine.
2. Program the machine for basic bread setting and press start.
3. Yields: 1 loaf/10 slices.
Note: All flours are approximate measures. You may use more or less, depending on the weight and absorbency of your flour.
- Per serving: 175 calories, 2.1g fat (11% of calories), 2.4g dietary fiber, 5.7g protein, 33.8g carbohydrates, 2.1g cholesterol, 248mg sodium.
- Adapted from Bread Machine Baking: Perfect Every Time (William Morrow and Co., Inc., 1993)
